items.title: Drones create the first-ever Fifa scoreboard in Seattle sky
items.description: BBC reporter Max Matza is in Seattle, Washington, where 400 drones lit up the night sky on Monday to display the score of the Egypt v Belgium match.
items.titleIt: Drones create the first-ever Fifa scoreboard in Seattle sky

items.title: Somalia: OIC Condemns Opening of Somaliland Mission in Jerusalem, Reaffirms Support for Somalia
items.description: [Shabelle] Jeddah -- The Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) on Tuesday strongly condemned the opening of what it described as a "Somaliland embassy" in occupied Jerusalem, calling the move illegal and a clear violation of international law and the United Nations Charter.
items.titleIt: Somalia: OIC Condemns Opening of Somaliland Mission in Jerusalem, Reaffirms Support for Somalia

items.title: Somaliland opens embassy in Jerusalem after historic Israeli recognition
items.description: For Somaliland, the embassy opening represents a diplomatic victory and could strengthen its campaign for broader international recognition. For Israel, it marks the deepening of ties with a strategic partner in the Horn of Africa.
items.titleIt: Somaliland opens embassy in Jerusalem after historic Israeli recognition

items.title: Sisi hosts Sheikh Mohamed, welcomes deal to end Iran war
items.description: Egyptian President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi and UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed met in Cairo to strengthen strategic ties and discuss regional security. The leaders welcomed the end of the Iran war and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz while calling for greater Arab coordination.
items.titleIt: Sisi hosts Sheikh Mohamed, welcomes deal to end Iran war

items.title: Somalia’s President Meets with a Delegation of Italian Business Leaders
items.description: (ANSA) - NAIROBI, 15 GIU - The President of the Federal Republic of Somalia, Hassan Sheikh Mohamud, received a delegation of entrepreneurs and investors from Italy at the presidential palace; they had arrived in Mogadishu to participate in a conference dedicated to trade cooperation and investment between Somalia and Italy. The meeting, which was also attended by the Italian Ambassador to Somalia, Pier Mario Daccò Coppi, focused on strengthening economic relations and promoting trade cooperation between the two countries. The Italian delegation included executives from commercial firms, major
items.titleIt: Somalia’s President Meets with a Delegation of Italian Business Leaders

items.title: FIFA to pay Somali referee barred by US despite failure to officiate
items.description: Omar Artan was deported by US immigration official after an 11-hour interrogation in Miami
items.titleIt: FIFA to pay Somali referee barred by US despite failure to officiate

items.title: Amorim new AC Milan coach say Portugal media
items.description: (ANSA) - ROME, JUN 15 - Former Sporting Lisbon and Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is the new coach of AC Milan following Massimiliano Allegri's exit, the Portuguese media said Monday saying that a deal had been reached with the 41-ywar-old from Lisbon. Amorim and Milan have reached an agreement, according to Portuguese newspaper A Bola. The Rossoneri and the coach, according to the Portuguese newspaper, have reached an agreement for a two-year contract with an option for a third year worth €3.5 million net per season plus bonuses tied to winning titles and qualifying for the Champions
items.titleIt: Amorim new AC Milan coach say Portugal media

The Rossoneri and the coach, according to the Portuguese newspaper, have reached an agreement for a two-year contract with an option for a third year worth €3.5 million net per season plus bonuses tied to winning titles and qualifying for the Champions
items.titleIt: Amorim new AC Milan coach say Portugal media

items.title: The Italy-France Science Days are launched to do science together
items.description: (ANSA) - ROMA, 15 GIU - The Italian Embassy in France and the Académie des sciences have signed a Memorandum of Understanding establishing the annual “Penser et faire la science, ensemble” Science Days, a new initiative designed to consolidate scientific cooperation between Italy and France and to strengthen the dialogue between research, institutions, and society. “The signing of the Memorandum represents an important step in the implementation of the Quirinale Treaty, which identifies research, innovation, and education as some of the fundamental pillars of the strategic partnership between
items.titleIt: The Italy-France Science Days are launched to do science together

items.title: Israel must stop bombing Beirut says Tajani
items.description: (ANSA) - LUXEMBOURG, JUN 15 - Deputy Premier and Foreign Minister Antonio Tajani said Monday that Israel must stop bombing Beirut after the United States and Iran reached an agreement to end the war in the Middle East. "We must ensure that the fighting in Lebanon stops too, that Israel no longer bombs Beirut," Tajani said on the sidelines of an EU foreign affairs council in Luxembourg. In her statement welcoming the deal reached between Washington and Tehran, Premier Giorgia Meloni said that "hostilities must also cease in Lebanon". Meloni said that "Italy will continue working to support Leba
items.titleIt: Israel must stop bombing Beirut says Tajani

items.title: Hostilities must stop in Lebanon too says Meloni
items.description: (ANSA) - ROME, JUN 15 - In a statement welcoming the deal reached between Washington and Tehran to stop the Iran war, Premier Giorgia Meloni said Monday that "hostilities must also cease in Lebanon". Meloni said that "Italy will continue working to support Lebanese sovereignty". (see related). (ANSA). Read article...
items.titleIt: Hostilities must stop in Lebanon too says Meloni

items.title: US-Iran deal is 'opportunity for peace that must be seized' says Meloni
items.description: (ANSA) - ROME, JUN 15 - Premier Giorgia Meloni on Monday welcomed the agreement reached between Washington and Tehran to end the Iran war. "Last night, together with France, Germany, and the United Kingdom, we had already expressed our strong appreciation for the memorandum of understanding signed by the United States and Iran hours ago," Meloni said in a statement, referring to a joint declaration she signed with the leaders of the three other European powers. "Heartfelt thanks go to all the mediators, and in particular to Qatar and Pakistan, who made this agreement possible. "This is an oppo
items.titleIt: US-Iran deal is 'opportunity for peace that must be seized' says Meloni

items.title: Italy willing to take part in Strait of Hormuz naval mission
items.description: (ANSA) - ROME, JUN 15 - Italy is willing to take part in an international naval mission for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz after Washington and Tehran reached an agreement to end the Iran war, Premier Giorgia Meloni said on Monday. "The principles are clear: Iran cannot acquire a nuclear weapon and freedom of navigation must be guaranteed," Meloni said in a statement. "We stand ready, together with our partners and without prejudice to the necessary authorisation from Parliament, to contribute to an international naval presence to support the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz". (se
items.titleIt: Italy willing to take part in Strait of Hormuz naval mission
